title: V8 Sandbox Bypass: AAW via array length corruption in Turbofan spread call inlining
bounty_rationale: V8 sandbox bypass demonstrating arbitrary write outside of the heap sandbox
description_snippet:
### VULNERABILITY DETAILS

#### Summary

V8 sandbox bypass, arbitrary address write by corrupting `AllocationSite` boilerplate array literal length to a negative value. When this array is used with spread syntax for a call/construct argument, tier-up compilation of this code results in `JSCallReduce
